title: Fix auth.json path (validated on Fedora 38)
body:
Fix path of auth.json file.

Signed-off-by: Andreas Mack <andreas.mack@gmail.com>

#### What this PR does / why we need it:
I search 15 minutes for the auth.json file. It seems the documentation is wrong.
